mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, max_length, required, sort_order, default_value, options FROM template_field WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT id, template_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, max_length, required, sort_order, default_value, options FROM template_field WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO template_field (template_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, max_length, required, sort_order, default_value, options) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldLabel}, #{fieldType}, #{maxLength}, #{required}, #{sortOrder}, #{defaultValue}, #{options})
mapper.update: UPDATE template_field SET field_name = #{fieldName}, field_label = #{fieldLabel}, field_type = #{fieldType}, max_length = #{maxLength}, required = #{required}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, default_value = #{defaultValue}, options = #{options} WHERE id = #{id}
